nfpa.label: NFPA 70E 2024
nfpa.description: Uses the National Fire Protection Association NFPA 70E Standard for Electrical Safety in the Workplace (2024 edition). Terminology reflects the current national consensus standard used by OSHA and industry.

ppe_categories.description: Arc-rated clothing (min. 4 cal/cm² rating), face shield, heavy-duty leather gloves

boundaries.name: Limited Approach Boundary
boundaries.definition: Approach limit within which a shock hazard exists. Unqualified persons may not cross without continuous escort by a qualified person.

workplace.label: Workplace Standards
workplace.description: Uses enhanced workplace safety procedures including facility-specific LOTO protocols, hazardous energy control, and PPE requirements aligned with industrial facility standards.

ppe_categories.description: Arc-rated shirt and pants or coverall

boundaries.name: Limited Approach Boundary
boundaries.definition: Closest unqualified persons may approach without escort from a qualified person.
